/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/icu4c@77/lib CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/Database.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/EdgeManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/VideoPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/edge.dir/src/NetworkClient.cpp.o -o edge   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib -lsqlite3 -lavformat -lavcodec -lswscale -lavutil /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.6/lib/libSDL2.dylib -L/opt/homebrew/lib -lavformat -lavcodec -lavutil -lswscale
